---
title: "Equilibrium Separation Stages Reference Page<br/>*The Shocking Truth About Equilibrium Stages—Are You Doing It Wrong?*"
author: "DOFPro group"
format: html
html-math-method: mathjax
---
::: {.callout-important title="Still Under Construction!"}
This web page is just a bare outline. The complete details have not been filled in yet.
:::
# Intro to *The Shocking Truth About Equilibrium Stages—Are You Doing It Wrong?*

Main title explanation

## Part 1

Video 1 explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/bY9fl5DJzmk?si=brE9cHtUxJxGpBno" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](85-EquilibriumSeparationStages1Visuals.qmd)

## Part 2

Video  explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/wc6gv7lNtI0?si=NNrEaQFVhE5Cmw1t" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](86-EquilibriumSeparationStages2Visuals.qmd)

## Part 3

Video  explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/jcChVoELvFo?si=PusFY_zjmwddEeSb" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
[Visuals](86.5-EquilibriumSeparationStages3Visuals.qmd)

# Examples and Definitions

## Examples Links

- [Hexane, Heptane, Octane Equilibrium Stage Example](https://dofprobucket1.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/material/HexHeptOctEqStage.ods) – A spreadsheet with the three-component Raoult's law calculation from Part 2
- [Liquid-Liquid Extraction Example](https://dofprobucket1.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/material/Example3LiqLiqExtact.ods) – A spreadsheet with the liquid-liquid extraction calculation from Part 3

## Definitions

Equilibrium Separation Stage
: A stage in a separator, such as a distillation column, that is modeled by assuming that the input flows are well mixed, and the mixture separates into output flows that are in equilibrium with each other.

Phase Fraction
: The fraction of a total mixture that consists of a given phase. It can be calculated on either a mass-fraction or mole-fraction basis, with different results for the different bases.

Liquid Fraction
: The fraction of a total mixture that is in the liquid phase. It can be calculated on either a mass-fraction or mole-fraction basis, with different results for the different bases.

Vapor Fraction
: The fraction of a total mixture that is in the vapor phase. It can be calculated on either a mass-fraction or mole-fraction basis, with different results for the different bases.

Distillation
: A separation process performed by repeated evaporations and condensations.

Liquid-Liquid Extraction
: A separation process performed by repeated mixing of partially miscible liquids and allowing the two liquid phases to separate.

# Other Links and Videos

## Other Links

## Previous and Following Videos

### The video previous to the previous video (i.e., two videos back)

**Dew Your Bubbles Have Flash? Part 2**<br/>*BUBL T, DEW T*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/9GyrfJzg-tg), [Info Page](../../balances/material/RaoultsLawDewBubbleFlashVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/material/75-Visuals.qmd)

### The previous video (i.e., one video back)

**Dew Your Bubbles Have Flash? Part 3**<br/>*FLASH*, *Pxy*, *Txy*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/bG15qQ9gB4c), [Info Page](../../balances/material/RaoultsLawDewBubbleFlashVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/material/75.5-Visuals.qmd)

### The next video (i.e., one video forward)

**Using DWSIM to Create Binary Phase Diagrams**<br/>*DWSIM, Binary Phase Diagrams*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/5NUchIg8q7E), [Info Page](../../balances/material/DWSIMBinaryPhaseVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

### The next after next video (i.e. two videos forward)

**Just Try to Break This Law! I Dare You!**<br/>*Intro to 1st Law*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/ZHWT9Jw7fzY), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/Intro1stLawVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/89-Intro1stLawVisuals.qmd)
